key.name: wall-dirs
key.description: Images are pulled from all folders listed here.

key.name: max-images
key.description: 0 means show all images without limit.

key.name: picture-mode
key.description: How the wallpaper fits the screen (zoom, stretched, centered, wallpaper, spanned).

key.name: sync-lockscreen
key.description: Whether to automatically sync the desktop wallpaper to the lock screen.

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: Show detailed logs in the system journal.
